message:
fix(installer): use .DirectoryName for provider-neutral temp path on Windows

New-TemporaryFile | Split-Path can produce provider-qualified paths like
Microsoft.PowerShell.Core\FileSystem::C:\... on some PowerShell hosts.
ZipFile::ExtractToDirectory rejects these paths with NotSupportedException.

Using (New-TemporaryFile).DirectoryName returns a clean filesystem path.

Closes #104

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
